title: Rubiks Cube
body: ## Description Mod/datapack adds a working Rubik's cube. ![preview](https://i.postimg.cc/JnZCQwnZ/2024-11-02-14-24-45.gif) ## How to use In order for the cube to appear or assemble, you need to use this command. ``` /function cube:cube ``` To make the cube colored you need to use this command. ``` /function cube:color_cube ``` To make a cube with stickers you need to use this command. ``` /function cube:stiker_cube ``` To rotate the edges, you need to sit on the seat (in order for the hitboxes to work correctly), hold down the left mouse button and turn in the direction where you want to scroll the edge. To start the timer you need to press the left button with the image of a palm, to stop it - on the right. To disassemble the cube you need to press the right orange button or the left one. The result is the same, but not the process. ## Dependencies - Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
